goal: Run a class-balanced Synthetic Data Generation (SDG) render batch on a scene with three workpiece classes (red_box, blue_box, green_box) and validate that each class is represented to a target minimum per frame. Scene: 3x3 grid of 9 boxes on a table (3 red, 3 blue, 3 green) under a randomized DomeLight + overhead camera. configure_coco_yolo_writer registers a per-class category map. create_sdg_pipeline builds the render product with rgb + bounding_box_2d annotators. enforce_class_balance(min_per_class=1, classes=['red_box','blue_box','green_box']) requires each frame to contain at least one instance of each class, re-randomizing the scene up to max_retries=8 times when occlusion drops a class. export_dataset(num_frames=90) writes the balanced 90-frame batch. validate_annotations cross-checks the COCO output: bounding boxes within image bounds, no zero-area boxes, no missing declared classes. SUCCESS: validate_annotations reports zero missing-class issues across the validated samples AND /tmp/sdg_class_balance/ contains 90 frames + annotations. Exercises create_prim, set_attribute (per-class DisplayColor), scatter_on_surface (initial pose randomization across the table), set_semantic_label (×3 classes), configure_coco_yolo_writer, create_sdg_pipeline, enforce_class_balance, preview_sdg, export_dataset, validate_annotations, benchmark_sdg. Realizes sdg-class-balance-rebalance-001 (sdg category, tier-1-locally-runnable).
thoughts: Pattern: other (SDG class-balance enforcement — no robot motion, no pick-place delivery criterion, success is annotation distribution shape).

Three-class scene rationale: red_box, blue_box, green_box. Three classes is the smallest non-trivial case that exercises the class-balance retry loop — a two-class scene degenerates to coin-flip rejection, and four+ classes confound the retry budget. The 3x3 grid (9 boxes, 3 per class) keeps the geometry budget cheap but creates realistic occlusion potential when DR pose-jitter is applied.

Per-class semantic labels assigned with set_semantic_label(class_name='red_box' | 'blue_box' | 'green_box'). The class labels must match exactly the strings passed to enforce_class_balance.classes and configure_coco_yolo_writer.categories — a typo here silently drops the class from the COCO category map without raising.

DisplayColor authoring (set_attribute primvars:displayColor) is sufficient to differentiate classes visually. Real workpieces would use OmniPBR materials, but for class-balance validation the renderer only needs each class to be visually distinguishable from the others — the labels (not the colors) drive the classifier.

scatter_on_surface is used ONCE to spread the 9 boxes over the table surface (with spacing=0.10 to prevent overlap). After the initial scatter, add_domain_randomizer(type='pose', target='/World/Box_.*') applies per-frame jitter so the class distribution varies frame-to-frame — this is what creates the occasional missing-class frame that enforce_class_balance must catch and retry.

configure_coco_yolo_writer(categories=['red_box','blue_box','green_box'], format='coco') builds a shared category map. categories list order determines the COCO category_id assignment (1, 2, 3) — this matters for downstream YOLOv8 / Detectron2 ingestion.

create_sdg_pipeline(annotators=['rgb','bounding_box_2d'], output_format='coco', num_frames=90) registers the pipeline. 90 frames = 3 (classes) × 30 (per-class minimum target before quotient/retry slack). enforce_class_balance ensures each frame has ≥1 instance of each class, so the resulting dataset has ≥90 per-class instances even before counting overlapping appearances.

enforce_class_balance(min_per_class=1, max_retries=8, classes=['red_box','blue_box','green_box'], write_partial_on_fail=False). write_partial_on_fail=False means a frame that still has a missing class after 8 retries is DROPPED entirely — strict mode. This is correct for class-balanced training data, where partial frames poison the distribution. The cost is fewer output frames if the retry budget is too low.
preview_sdg(num_samples=6) generates a 2x3 visual grid so the operator can confirm all three classes are co-present in preview frames before committing the full 90-frame run.

benchmark_sdg(num_frames=20, annotators=['rgb','bounding_box_2d']) measures FPS so the operator can estimate wall-clock cost of class-balanced runs (which are slower than unconstrained SDG due to retry overhead).

validate_annotations(num_samples=30) reads back the written COCO annotations and confirms (a) bounding boxes within image bounds, (b) no zero-area boxes, (c) no missing declared classes. The third check is the class-balance gate: if the writer dropped annotations for any of the three classes in any validated frame, this surfaces as a class-balance violation.

Distinct from CP-NEW-scene-sdg-full-pipeline (single-class 'cube', no class-balance enforcement, 200 frames). Distinct from CP-NEW-defect-sdg (defect classification, 20 cubes, no COCO writer). This canonical is the ONLY one that exercises enforce_class_balance + validate_annotations together as a quality gate on a multi-class SDG run.
motion_controllers: none — pure data generation, no arm motion in this workflow.

BLOCKER: omni.replicator extension must be enabled. enforce_class_balance + validate_annotations are part of feat/addendum-phase7B-sdg-* — handlers must be present in the running build. If missing, the calls return a 'tool not registered' error and the canonical fails at the form-gate.
code:
# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Table surface ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.7, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── 9 boxes: 3 red + 3 blue + 3 green, arranged in a 3x3 grid on the table ────
_classes = [
    ("red_box",   [0.85, 0.10, 0.10]),
    ("blue_box",  [0.10, 0.20, 0.85]),
    ("green_box", [0.15, 0.75, 0.20]),
]
for c_idx, (class_name, color) in enumerate(_classes):
    for i in range(3):
        path = f"/World/Box_{class_name}_{i+1}"
        col = i
        row = c_idx
        create_prim(
            prim_path=path,
            prim_type="Cube",
            position=[col * 0.18 - 0.18, row * 0.20 - 0.20, 0.81],
            size=0.07,
        )
        for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI"):
            apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
        # Per-class DisplayColor — visually distinguishes classes
        set_attribute(prim_path=path, attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[color])
        # Semantic label — drives COCO / YOLO class id
        set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=class_name)

# ── Initial pose scatter across the table surface ────────────────────────────
# Spreads the 9 boxes with Poisson spacing so they don't visually overlap on f0
scatter_on_surface(
    source_prims=[
        "/World/Box_red_box_1", "/World/Box_red_box_2", "/World/Box_red_box_3",
        "/World/Box_blue_box_1", "/World/Box_blue_box_2", "/World/Box_blue_box_3",
        "/World/Box_green_box_1", "/World/Box_green_box_2", "/World/Box_green_box_3",
    ],
    target_mesh="/World/Table",
    count=9,
    spacing=0.10,
    normal_align=False,
    penetration_check=True,
    seed=42,
)

# ── SDG camera (overhead nadir, slight tilt for realistic occlusion) ───────────
configure_camera(
    camera_path="/World/SdgCamera",
    position=[0, 0, 1.65],
    look_at=[0, 0, 0.75],
)

# ── Per-frame pose jitter — this is what causes occasional missing classes ───
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Box_.*",
    randomizer_type="pose",
    params={"min_angle": -0.4, "max_angle": 0.4, "surface_prim": "/World/Table"},
)

# ── DomeLight intensity randomization (photometric variance) ──────────────────
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/DomeLight",
    randomizer_type="lighting",
    params={"intensity_min": 500.0, "intensity_max": 2000.0},
)

# ── Configure COCO writer with 3-class category map ───────────────────────────
configure_coco_yolo_writer(
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_class_balance",
    cameras=["/World/SdgCamera"],
    format="coco",
    categories=["red_box", "blue_box", "green_box"],
)

# ── Create SDG pipeline ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_sdg_pipeline(
    annotators=["bounding_box_2d", "instance_segmentation"],
    output_format="coco",
    num_frames=90,
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_class_balance",
    camera_position=[0, 0, 1.65],
    camera_look_at=[0, 0, 0.75],
    resolution=[1280, 720],
)

# ── Enforce class balance: each frame must contain ≥1 of each class ──────────
# write_partial_on_fail=False → drop frames that still miss a class after retries
enforce_class_balance(
    min_per_class=1,
    max_retries=8,
    classes=["red_box", "blue_box", "green_box"],
    write_partial_on_fail=False,
)

# ── Visual preview: confirm all 3 classes co-present in preview frames ───────
preview_sdg(num_samples=6)

# ── Throughput benchmark (class-balanced runs are slower due to retries) ──────
benchmark_sdg(
    num_frames=20,
    annotators=["bounding_box_2d", "instance_segmentation"],
    resolution=[1280, 720],
)

# ── Full export: 90 class-balanced annotated frames ──────────────────────────
export_dataset(
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_class_balance",
    num_frames=90,
    step_batch=10,
)

# ── Validate output: confirm bounding boxes valid, no missing classes ────────
validate_annotations(num_samples=30)
verified_status: drafted-2026-05-16-A72; form-gate-schema TBD; function-gate BLOCKED (requires omni.replicator extension + handlers for enforce_class_balance + validate_annotations + configure_coco_yolo_writer + benchmark_sdg)
failure_modes: omni.replicator not enabled: enable_extension('omni.replicator.core') must be called before create_sdg_pipeline; handler may auto-enable but Kit must have been launched with extension available

scatter_on_surface spacing=0.10 vs 9 boxes on a 1.0x0.7m table: if the surface area cannot fit 9 placements at 0.10m Poisson spacing, scatter_on_surface returns fewer placements and unplaced boxes remain stacked at origin — reduce spacing to 0.08 or shrink box count to 6 if scatter under-delivers

set_semantic_label class_name typo: the strings passed to set_semantic_label MUST EXACTLY MATCH the categories list passed to configure_coco_yolo_writer and enforce_class_balance.classes. A 'red_boxes' vs 'red_box' mismatch silently drops the class from the COCO output without raising — enforce_class_balance will then retry on every frame and ultimately drop them all when write_partial_on_fail=False

enforce_class_balance with write_partial_on_fail=False and max_retries=8: on heavily-occluded scenes the retry budget may be exhausted on every frame, resulting in zero output frames. If observed, raise max_retries to 16 or set write_partial_on_fail=True and analyze the partial frames

add_domain_randomizer type='pose' surface_prim='/World/Table': Table must have PhysicsCollisionAPI so PhysX can report its surface; missing API causes pose jitter to project boxes through the table and fall off-camera, guaranteeing missing classes

configure_coco_yolo_writer cameras=['/World/SdgCamera']: camera prim must exist before writer config; configure_camera creates it but the path must match exactly. A mistyped path causes the writer to attach to no camera and produce zero frames

create_sdg_pipeline annotator order ['bounding_box_2d','instance_segmentation']: instance_segmentation requires PhysX or render-time identity buffers; on headless Kit without GPU instance ID resolution this may fall back to 2D bbox only — validate_annotations will then report missing instance masks

export_dataset step_batch=10: if Kit render product is not ready the step loop stalls; ensure preview_sdg completed at least one frame before export. Class-balanced runs are 2-4x slower than unconstrained — wall-clock cost may exceed expectations

validate_annotations num_samples=30 > frames-written: if export_dataset produced fewer than 30 valid frames (due to retry exhaustion), validate_annotations caps to actual count and reports a lower sample size; this is INFO, not failure
Output dir /tmp/sdg_class_balance must be writable; on shared servers /tmp may be small (≈100 frames at 1280x720 ≈ 30 MB) — use workspace/sdg_output/ if /tmp fills
benchmark_sdg must be called AFTER create_sdg_pipeline (pipeline must exist); calling it before pipeline registration returns 'no active pipeline' error
extension_notes: First canonical in library to use enforce_class_balance + validate_annotations together as a quality gate. CP-NEW-scene-sdg-full-pipeline is single-class ('cube') and does not enforce balance. CP-NEW-defect-sdg is multi-class but uses unconstrained random sampling. This template adds the strict class-quota retry loop and the post-write annotation audit as a packaged workflow. Backlog source: sdg-class-balance-rebalance-001 (priority_tier=2, category=sdg, tier=tier-1-locally-runnable, blockers=[]). Note: backlog goal mentions 500 per-class instances; this template targets a leaner 90-frame smoke-batch (≥30 per class via min_per_class=1) — scale num_frames to 500 + min_per_class=1 for the full target, but smoke-test at 90 first.
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1200.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path={{scatter_surface.path}}, prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.7, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path={{scatter_surface.path}}, schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

_class_groups = [
    ("red_box",   {{class_a_workpieces}}),
    ("blue_box",  {{class_b_workpieces}}),
    ("green_box", {{class_c_workpieces}}),
]
for c_idx, (class_name, group) in enumerate(_class_groups):
    for i, wp in enumerate(group):
        path = wp["path"]
        col = i
        row = c_idx
        create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[col*0.18-0.18, row*0.20-0.20, 0.81], size=0.07)
        for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI"):
            apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
        set_attribute(prim_path=path, attr_name="primvars:displayColor", value=[wp["color"]])
        set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=class_name)

scatter_on_surface(
    source_prims=[wp["path"] for group in ({{class_a_workpieces}}, {{class_b_workpieces}}, {{class_c_workpieces}}) for wp in group],
    target_mesh={{scatter_surface.path}},
    count=9,
    spacing={{scatter_surface.spacing}},
    normal_align=False,
    penetration_check=True,
    seed=42,
)

configure_camera(
    camera_path={{sdg_camera.path}},
    position={{sdg_camera.position}},
    look_at={{sdg_camera.look_at}},
)

add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/Box_.*",
    randomizer_type="pose",
    params={"min_angle": -0.4, "max_angle": 0.4, "surface_prim": {{scatter_surface.path}}},
)
add_domain_randomizer(
    target="/World/DomeLight",
    randomizer_type="lighting",
    params={"intensity_min": 500.0, "intensity_max": 2000.0},
)

configure_coco_yolo_writer(
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_class_balance",
    cameras=[{{sdg_camera.path}}],
    format="coco",
    categories=["red_box", "blue_box", "green_box"],
)

create_sdg_pipeline(
    annotators=["bounding_box_2d", "instance_segmentation"],
    output_format="coco",
    num_frames=90,
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_class_balance",
    camera_position={{sdg_camera.position}},
    camera_look_at={{sdg_camera.look_at}},
    resolution=[1280, 720],
)

enforce_class_balance(
    min_per_class=1,
    max_retries=8,
    classes=["red_box", "blue_box", "green_box"],
    write_partial_on_fail=False,
)

preview_sdg(num_samples=6)

benchmark_sdg(
    num_frames=20,
    annotators=["bounding_box_2d", "instance_segmentation"],
    resolution=[1280, 720],
)

export_dataset(
    output_dir="/tmp/sdg_class_balance",
    num_frames=90,
    step_batch=10,
)

validate_annotations(num_samples=30)
